Sales Strategies
Module 5
Here are some sales strategies to consider that
can increase conversions during your launch…
Add-ons to consider during Open Cart
• Something to email about every day
• A Case Studies page (with all case studies listed)
• An All Access page (with all videos/downloads)
• Additional content
• Live broadcast
• Unboxing or product “tour”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 3 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	2
Checkout Page strategies to consider…
• Adding a live chat component (we use
livechatinc.com)
• (our team answered 2206 chats w//97%
satisfaction rate)
• Having a countdown timer on top of the checkout
page
• Payment options: single pay vs. payment plan
Abandon cart strategies…
• Adding an abandon cart email sequence tossed
to those that left the checkout page without
completing their purchase
• (we ended up with over 6 figures in sales this
year from the abandon cart sequence)
Strategies for when the cart closes…
• Putting up a “program closed” page with an opt-
in form to register to be notified when it opens
again (so visitors get added to your list)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
